pages.title: kino — a themeable React video player
pages.description: kino is a themeable React video player with a pluggable-provider architecture — glass chrome, keyboard-first controls, and a small typed surface over Mux, raw files, and more.

pages.title: Install & API — kino
pages.description: Install @karnstack/kino, mount your first player, and learn the props surface shared by every provider.

pages.title: Providers — kino
pages.description: The Provider contract and the five shipped engines — Mux HLS, native files, YouTube, Vimeo, and audio-driven scenes — under one glass UI.

pages.title: The scene protocol — kino
pages.description: The sequence manifest and the postMessage wire format between kino's embedding player and the iframe scene host.

pages.title: Theming — kino
pages.description: Theme kino with CSS custom properties — accent, surfaces, and typography — plus the keyboard map and capability-gated controls.
